title: The Straw Hats Are Cornered
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on the straw hats are cornered, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Straw Hats Are Cornered. The Straw Hats reach Rainbase while Marines, Baroque Works, and Crocodile’s casino pull every side into the same trap. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Do you think it was alright trusting them with getting the water?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm gonna go to a washroom.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's just a little errand. I'm sure they can handle it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't worry.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I don't know... They might just come back with more than just water, if you know what I'm sayin'...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It might not be good to get too relaxed while waiting here.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Alert the Marines! I'm chasing after them!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Umm, how much do we owe you!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Well if you know those two who just ran out with the water, you'll have to pay for them too!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: S-sorry for the trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Why the hell are the Marines here!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: How would I know!? Just keep running!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Oh crap! They've got the marines on their tails!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No, that can't be!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And why're they running this way!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh no, chopper's not back yet!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't worry, he'll figure something out!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Guys! The Marines are here!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yeah, thanks to you @idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't let them escape this time!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fast little buggers...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Isn't it really bad to run around town like this? We'll be spotted by Baroque Works agents!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'd say it's too late to worry about that.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Remember, I

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Then let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Let's go meet Crocodile, Vivil

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Alright.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's in that building with the crocodile on top. Do you see it!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: That's Rain Dinners, the casino owned by Crocodile!

summary: This part develops the straw hats are cornered and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
